column1: # 128-bit beat (16 B). Purpose: show the END-TO-END utilisation fall-off as the
# transfer shrinks with a FIXED outstanding depth.
# Physics: the AR->first-R fill latency (~58 cyc at this memory model) is a
# fixed cost per transfer. With fixed outstanding it cannot be hidden once the
# transfer is too small to amortise it
# (beats + fill) collapses toward 1/(1+fill) at a single beat. The DATAPATH
# (gated) utilisation stays ~100% throughout -- the engine is efficient while
# data flows; it simply runs out of data to move. This sweep is the small-end
# complement to size_sweep (8 KB..1 MB plateau).
# Columns: name
#   transfer_bytes is raw bytes here (16 B = one 128-bit beat).
